prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 10 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Nausea, reduced appetite, and fatigue over the last 1-2 months with ongoing renal function decline.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Major Depressive Disorder
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.4 kg; Height 183.6 cm; BMI 20.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/62 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.9%; current 9.3%), FPG (12 months ago 204mg/dL; 9 months ago 224mg/dL; 6 months ago 231mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 209mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 70.2kg; 9 months ago 67.3kg; 6 months ago 72.1kg; 3 months ago 66.6kg; current 68.4kg), Height (12 months ago 183.6cm; 9 months ago 183.6cm; 6 months ago 183.6cm; 3 months ago 183.6cm; current 183.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 60mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 62mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 60U/L; 9 months ago 53U/L; 6 months ago 54U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 59U/L), AST (12 months ago 79U/L; 9 months ago 70U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 69U/L; current 76U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 6.2mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 5.3mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 3.3mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 784mg/g; 9 months ago 653mg/g; 6 months ago 713mg/g; 3 months ago 1038mg/g; current 980mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 36mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 171mg/dL; 9 months ago 160mg/dL; 6 months ago 156mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.42 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
